final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: editorial still life photography, fine art print
Primary request: wabi-sabi still life composition emphasizing imperfect beauty and traces of time
Scene/backdrop: weathered wooden table with visible grain, patina, and wear marks, minimal interior setting
Subject: coarse pottery vase with rough texture and irregular glaze, dried bare branches arranged inside
Style/medium: fine art still life photography, wabi-sabi aesthetic
Composition/framing: medium close-up, eye-level perspective, intentional asymmetry and negative space
Lighting/mood: soft natural daylight streaming diagonally from window, gentle shadows, contemplative and serene atmosphere
Color palette: muted earth tones, warm browns, off-whites, subtle grays, desaturated palette
Materials/textures: rough unglazed clay vase, brittle dried twigs, aged wood with cracks and stains
Constraints: preserve the imperfect, aged quality of all elements; avoid symmetry and polished perfection
Avoid: glossy finishes, vibrant colors, symmetrical composition, plastic textures, over-sharpening
